---
description: Scan the project codebase, refresh the active stack profile, and produce a high-level codebase map.
---

Scan this codebase using the workflow in `.github/skills/scan-codebase/SKILL.md`.

Read the skill first, then follow its phases: Refresh Stack Profile → Root Survey → Structural Scan → Entry Points → Architectural Layers → Key Conventions → Dependencies Summary → Write Output.

Save the result to `docs/ai/implementation/codebase-map.md`.

Report the refreshed Active Stack Profile values and remind me to re-run after major structural changes.
